description_long: This object is a cubic wooden structure with a recessed panel on each visible face, featuring a single diagonal plank across the front, reminiscent of classic wooden crates. The wood grain is light and natural, with a smooth, matte finish and visible texture. The top surface is flat and bordered by a shallow lip, suggesting it could support items placed on it. There are no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, and the design is simple and utilitarian. The object appears solid and robust, with no visible openings or moving parts. Its construction and appearance suggest it is more decorative or functional as a storage box rather than a traditional filing cabinet.
description: A cubic, light wood box with recessed panels and a diagonal plank, featuring a smooth, matte finish and no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_0: The front view shows a recessed panel with a single diagonal plank running from the bottom left to the top right.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, with the diagonal plank running in the same direction and the wood grain visible.
description_view_2: The diagonal plank now runs from the top left to the bottom right, showing the opposite face of the box.
description_view_3: This view shows a plain recessed panel with no diagonal plank, highlighting the simple wood grain texture.
